claims.claim: A CNN-based framework effectively reconstructs light fields from sparse angular views by modeling the task as angular restoration on epipolar plane images.
claims.title: Light Field Reconstruction Using Convolutional Network on EPI and Extended Applications

claims.claim: Transforming angular pixel samples into the frequency domain via 2D-DFT enables accurate classification of surface reflection types based on distinct spectral energy distributions.
claims.title: Light Field Reconstruction Using Convolutional Network on EPI and Extended Applications

claims.claim: The proposed angle-frequency analysis achieves real-time, pixel-level material classification with over 85% accuracy and an AUC exceeding 0.90 while maintaining linear computational complexity.
claims.title: Light Field Reconstruction Using Convolutional Network on EPI and Extended Applications

claims.claim: Incorporating reflection-type priors derived from angular spectral features significantly improves depth estimation accuracy in complex non-Lambertian scenes.
claims.title: Light Field Reconstruction Using Convolutional Network on EPI and Extended Applications
